title: Languages
excerpt: description: Languages supported on Workers, a polyglot platform. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Workers is a polyglot platform, and provides first-class support for the following programming languages: * [ JavaScript ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/languages/javascript/)
